creator: freebsd@dns.company
text:
Created attachment 209605
NSD - removed dupl line rc script.

While peaking at code of the NSD port I discovered a duplicate line in the rc script.
I removed that, and tested it using portlint, using poudriere and running it in reality.
All fine, nothing unexpected.

Because the update is so minor I didn't place a PORTREVISION
(as the impact of that would be pointless updates).
